subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of the Mighty, the Beauteous, wherein God maketh mention of one among His servants, that he may be of them that remember [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز جمیل و فیه یذکر الله عبدا من عباده لیکون من المتذکرین
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
